texto: Try to be like someone and you'll lose the beauty of being you
autor: relish His unique workmanship in you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a relish His unique workmanship in you.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Try to be like someone and you'll lose the beauty of being you” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, steven-chopade, someone pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
